Failing test: "should keep a live cell alive with three live neighbors"
Expected behavior: A live cell with exactly 3 live neighbors survives to next generation
Current error: expected [ '1,0', '-1,0' ] to include '0,0'
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_17-35-01_game-of-life-prose_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal code to make it pass.

The current implementation only keeps cells alive with exactly 2 neighbors. The minimal change to make the new test pass (3 neighbors should also keep alive) is to change the condition to allow 2 OR 3 neighbors.

input.new_string:
const n = countLiveNeighbors(livingCells, x, y);
    if (n === 2 || n === 3) result.add(cell);
